description.unified: Dispels harmful effects from the ally with the lowest current HP and restores HP ??? 3 times. When healing the target, nearby allies are additionally healed for 40% of the healing amount.

Grants a shield to [all->4] ally with the highest damage dealt, absorbing ??? damage for [12 sec->16 sec]. While the shield is active, Healing Rate increases by [50%->11%] and CC Resistance increases by [(added) 100]. [(removed) ATK increased by 20%, immunity to CC]

Deals ??? Magic DMG to the target and nearby enemies 6times, then inflicts Blind for [6 sec->2sec]. This skill is applied with an increased Critical Rate of [500->800]. [(removed) 25% increased All DMG for 10 sec]
For 15 sec, heals [1->2] allies with the lowest current HP for [15%->1.5%] of Max HP [duration->10 times], and increases Magic DEF by ???. [(removed) Reduces All DMG taken by 15%]

light.unified: Mana cost increases by [1->1000], but the target count changes to 2.

dark.unified: Healed allies take [25%->40%] less Magic DMG for 10 sec.

light.unified: Increases the target’s Physical DMG taken by [(added) 10%] for 10 sec. [(removed) Mana cost cost increased by 1, DMG increased by 80%]

dark.unified: Increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by [(added) 10%] for 10 sec. [(removed) Changes the target to random enemies]

light.unified: Activates [Goddess Grace] additionally at the start of every battle. [(removed) Reduces DMG from non-heroes by 30%]

dark.unified: Magic DMG taken by Frey is reduced by [(added) 20%]. [(removed) Number of targets changes to 2]

description.unified: [Blessings of Light] Increases the shield amount by 50% and recovers {0} Mana every sec for 4 sec.
[Heaven's Vengeance] changes the attack target to a random target and increases Blind duration by {0} sec. [(removed) Target takes 20% increased M.DMG for 10 sec]
Every 8sec, heals 4 allies with the lowest current HP for {0}% of ATK, and increases the Critical Rate by [300->160] and Critical DMG by {1}% of [1->4] allies with the highest ATK for 8 sec.

Summons the spirit of Rosmerta for 12 sec, recovering HP of 1 allies with the lowest HP by ??? for 1 sec. Additionally, every 1sec, attacks the enemy with the highest ATK and nearby enemies, dealing ??? M.DMG and stunning them for [1 sec->0.5sec]

1.from: Duration of the soul is changed to 15 sec.

2.from: Increases Heal Rate by 50%, and the healed target blocks all incoming attacks for 5 sec.
2.to: Healed targets block all attacks for 5 sec.
2.unified: Healed targets block all attacks for 5 sec. [(removed) Increase Heal Rate by 50%]
